title: The Mink Tribe and Jack's Ruin
main_description: Luffy's group meets Wanda, Carrot, Pedro, Bepo and the Mink guardians while learning that Jack destroyed the Mokomo Dukedom and that Sanji's group may still be alive.
key_events: Wanda and Carrot Warn of Whale Forest
The Heart Pirates and the Guardians
Jack's Destruction of Zou Is Revealed
